title: tephrosia zambiana
intro: Tephrosia zambiana, also known as the Zambian shrub pea or pea flower, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia zambiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
